assertions.assertion: States that no separate NuGet package is needed — SAML is built into Duende.IdentityServer
assertions.rationale: Clearly states 'SAML 2.0 Identity Provider support is built into Duende.IdentityServer — there is no separate NuGet package to install'.

assertions.assertion: States that Enterprise Edition license is required
assertions.rationale: Clearly states 'Enterprise Edition license' is required.

assertions.assertion: Mentions SAML support was introduced in version 8.0
assertions.rationale: States 'SAML 2.0 IdP support was introduced in version 8.0'.
